title: Fix IID derivation description in 06-security.md §8.5 to match code, 8.7, and yggdrasil-derivation.json (clear U/L bit, SHA-256+SHA-512 split)
description: Update the outdated 8.5 Unified Ed25519 Identity Derivation section which incorrectly uses |=0x02 and incomplete Yggdrasil mapping. Align with normative derivation in 8.7, rust/lichen-link/src/identity.rs:14-48, python/src/lichen/crypto/identity.py:116-198, and test vectors. Emphasize single Ed25519 key for signatures, OSCORE (via X25519), IID, and 02xx addr.
close_reason: Updated 8.5 derivation description to match code (clear U/L bit, SHA-256+SHA-512 split for IID/Yggdrasil), 8.7, test vectors, and unified single-key emphasis. Spec now consistent across 03/04/06. Tests unaffected.
